profile.name: Shady Attia
profile.tagline: Building scalable, high-performance web applications with a focus on efficiency and modern architecture.

experience.description: Developing end-to-end features from database design to UI implementation, optimizing application performance and reducing load times.
achievements: Reduced page load time by 30% through efficient state management and image optimization.
Implemented secure authentication and authorization flows using JWT and OAuth2.
Collaborated in Agile environments to deliver iterative value to 10k+ active users.

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured online store with real-time inventory and secure payments.
projects.problem: High latency during checkout and inconsistent state across devices.
projects.solution: Implemented Redis caching for session management and optimized SQL queries.
projects.result: Increased conversion rate by 15% and reduced checkout time to under 2 seconds.

projects.title: AI Content Engine
projects.description: An automated content generation tool leveraging LLMs and Vector databases.
projects.problem: Manual content creation was slow and inconsistent across different brand voices.
projects.solution: Developed a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline to infuse brand-specific context into LLM prompts.
projects.result: Reduced content production time by 70% while maintaining high brand alignment.

projects.title: Cloud Infrastructure Orchestrator
projects.description: A DevOps tool to automate Kubernetes cluster deployment and monitoring.
projects.problem: Manual infrastructure setup was prone to errors and took hours per environment.
projects.solution: Created a set of Terraform modules and Helm charts for one-click environment provisioning.
projects.result: Deployment time dropped from 4 hours to 10 minutes with 100% consistency.
